title: Pay and hours | Employment New Zealand
content:
## Pay and hours Te utu me ngā hāora
All about pay, hours at work and what breaks employees are entitled to.
- Pay and wages Employees work in exchange for some form of payment. Pay can include wages, salary, commission and piece rates. Minimum wage Holidays and leave pay Types of pay Allowances Deductions and premiums Pay periods and paydays Payslips Final pay Setting pay, pay reviews and pay rises
Employees work in exchange for some form of payment. Pay can include wages, salary, commission and piece rates.
- Holidays and leave pay
- Deductions and premiums
- Pay periods and paydays
- Setting pay, pay reviews and pay rises
- Hours and breaks Learn about the rules for setting and changing work hours, and what breaks employees are entitled to. Hours of work Rest and breaks Rostering Working overtime or extra shifts
Learn about the rules for setting and changing work hours, and what breaks employees are entitled to.
- Working overtime or extra shifts
